title: Code of Conduct and Workplace Behavior Expectations
text:
Q: What are the expectations for workplace behavior and the code of conduct?
A: Our company expects all employees to adhere to a high standard of conduct that promotes a respectful and inclusive workplace. This includes treating colleagues, clients, and visitors with dignity, avoiding harassment or discrimination of any kind, and maintaining professionalism in all interactions. Employees are expected to comply with all company policies, including those related to attendance, punctuality, and dress code. Any behavior that undermines the integrity of the workplace, such as bullying, gossip, or substance abuse, is strictly prohibited. If you witness or experience any violations of this code, please report the incident to your supervisor or the HR department within 24 hours. The company will investigate all reports promptly and confidentially. For further details, refer to the Employee Handbook or contact HR at hr@company.com.
